title: Kanban card hidden columns

posts.author: avitalsi (a)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use 2 views - table and kanban.
In table, we customised the columns and hid many of them. We did that to not overwhelm the team and for other reasons.

In the kanban view, however, all the columns are visible, once you open a Kanban Card.
The kanban is organized by status, so Status is the columns we can hide or show. But inside the card there is no option to remove \ hide the columns, they just all show up.

Please hide columns in kanban cards, if they are hidden in table view (and other views but kanban)

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey! Shannon here with the monday team. Thank you for submitting this feature request. While the “Hide” feature for the Kanban View is specific to the labels within the selected Status Column for the view, users can hide their board columns via the settings:

Screenshot 2025-05-19 at 10.51.01 AM388×391 18.9 KB

Are you looking for further customization?

posts.author: avitalsi (a)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the response

It is present in the old kanban view, not the new one:

image383×406 13.6 KB
